calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation
Off Calendar May-04-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Eunice Chang (415-533-9552) for Plaintiffs/Moving party JIAN HUAN LIAO and NICOLE HU.
Bradley J. Jameson (707-252-1505) of Phillips Spallas & Angstadt for Defendants/opposing party.

Hearing is held. Both sides ARGUE. Plaintiff wants copy of stipulation for settlement signed by defendants on January 10, 2017 held by defendants' counsel. Defendants' Counsel states the settlement from January was only signed by one of the three defendants. He is ready to hand over final formal agreement signed by all three defendants. Parties cannot agree on attorneys fees. Initial settlement agreement for each side to bare own costs. Plaintiff argues defendants were in breach of that contract due to late payment and now requests attorney's fees and cost. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFFs JIAN HUAN LIAO and NICOLE HU's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation is DENIED. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than April 18, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
